title: Duplicate item(s) w/more than one copy
excerpt: It’d be great if we could duplicate an item with more than one copy at a time. Example: I have a board with several tasks/subtasks set up as template items that I copy and use as needed (i.e., new employee setup items). …

posts.author: ashleylyn07 (Ashley Boose)
posts.cookedHtml: It’d be great if we could duplicate an item with more than one copy at a time. Example: I have a board with several tasks/subtasks set up as template items that I copy and use as needed (i.e., new employee setup items). But a lot of times I’ll have a few new employees to set up at once, so I have to select the item, select Duplicate and then wait for it to finish duplicating it (including all the subtasks) and then repeat the process a few more times. It would be easier if I could select the item, click Duplicate and then select/enter “4” (for example) and the task/subtasks be duplicated 4 times at once.

posts.author: richpeers (Rich Peers)
posts.cookedHtml: @ashleylyn07 Did you get a reply to this as would be useful feature or find a workaround?

posts.author: ashleylyn07 (Ashley Boose)
posts.cookedHtml: No, unfortunately you are the first response I’ve gotten on this one. I’m disappointed because I could use a feature like this almost every day in Monday.

posts.author: richpeers (Rich Peers)
posts.cookedHtml: @ashleylyn07 Yes we would be the same, dont expect it to be on the roadmap this year unfortunately
